message:
feat(stdlib): Add missing CPython stdlib features for 100% alignment

- unittest: Add fail(), TestSuite, TestLoader, TextTestRunner, maxDiff
- collections: Add ChainMap, UserDict, UserList, UserString
- datetime: Add strptime, combine, replace, timezone, tzinfo, UTC, DatetimeExt
- json: Add load/dump (file I/O), indent, sort_keys, JSONEncoder, JSONDecoder
- Update plan-stdlib.md with Sprint 6 for 100% CPython alignment
